rulings.Case Title: NICOLE WOOLDRIDGE VS. ARTHUR STEVEN BROWN, ALSO KNOWN AS STEVE BROWN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Moiton Top Compel Deft To Produce Party Affiliated Witness Alana Parker For Deposition And Production Of Documents And Awaard For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 30, 2013, line 1. -PLAINTIFF NICOLE WOOLDRIDGE'S Notice Of Motion And Motion Top Compel Defendant To Produce Party Affiliated Witness Alana Parker For Deposition And Production Of Documents And Award For Monetary Sanctions. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Defendant to Produce Party Affiliated Witness for Deposition and Production of Documents is moot as to deposition is GRANTED as to production of documents. All responsive documents must be personally served within 10 days of Notice of Entry of Order. Sanctions granted (1) against defendant Brown and counsel Jeffrey Margulies in the amount of $6,288 to be paid to Plaintiff's counsel within 10 days of Notice of Entry of Order; and (2) against defendant Brown and current counsel in the amount of $2, 625 to be paid to Plaintiff's counsel within 10 days of Notice of Entry of Order. =(D501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MONICA D. KENNEY VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 30, 2013, line 2. - DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurer to Complaint is continued to August 16, 2013. This action is stayed until August 15, 2013 per stipulation and order 7/2/2013. =(D501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS VS. LOUISE LOVE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 30, 2013, line 3. - DEFENDANT RENEE JONES MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT, DEFAULT JUDGMENT and LEAVE TO DEFEND. Defendant Jones' Motion to Set Aside Default and Default Judgment is DENIED. Defendant failed to sustain burden under CCP 473(b). Request for stay pending resolution of CGC-13-531707 is DENIED. No authority in support of this request is cited. Defendant's unauthorized filings made at 3 p.m. on July 24, 2013 are stricken. Defendant's counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B in future. =(D501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NORMAN LEONG VS. FRANKIE BALISTRERI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 30, 2013, line 4. - DEFENDANT FRANKIE BALISTRERI MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Judgment is GRANTED as to Frankie Balistreri only, subject to opposition. =(D501/REQ)
